reviews.review_description: this game is a perfect game besides the fact that doesn't have survival and no animals that will feed you on survival if you guys are to come out with an update on survival which i'm praying that you guys do then you guys also have to add animals or maybe crops and possibly weapons and i'd play this game a lot more if it had survival mode. all in all it's a great game great graphics me and my brother are having very fun time and i'm gonna let him try it.

As the title says, the fun in this game comes from creativity, not survival or killing mobs.

 Anyone calling this boring never had a childhood or can't remember this fact, what's the point of legos? There you go remember? A box of Legos is all you needed! That's what this is but an organic world vs a plastic one. I will definitely buy this to own  beyond meta + membership. To the Dev this is great don't make it a Minecraft game. If anything add interaction to what you build.

reviews.review_title: Great game for building and co-op works!
reviews.review_description:
Bought this game when it first came out and really liked it, visually it is excellent and the controls are intuitive once you've been in a few minutes. Unfortunately at that time The co-op wasn't working and I really bought the game to play with my son, so at that time I returned the game for a refund with the intention to pick it up again once the co-op was up and running properly. 
I have purchased the game again today and have successfully connected with my son via the IP connection as the join code didn't work, however using the alternate IP connection mode offered we connected straight away with no issues and enjoyed a great no glitch co-op building session.
The game is great and relaxing and very enjoyable and I look forward to spending more time enjoying this with my son.
Well done to the solo developer for creating this game.

This game is just straight up boring. Also it's more effort than regular Minecraft and you can do less. Fires not bad but yeah won't be returning unless there is a proper survival mode and even then without coop I can't be bothered.
SURVIVAL MODE!!!!!!!!!!!!

Great game. It completely absorbed me. When I want to kill time, there's nothing better. I already have a decent city. I'm just having trouble logging in and uploading. I still can't log in even though I get codes in my email.

reviews.review_title: Prefer the first version at this stage.
reviews.review_description:
I'm a big fan of the first version, and the kids love it.
This one the scale is a bit too large and I can't find a smooth turn option (although I managed to turn off the vignette thankfully). 
The MR mode is appreciated, but not at the expense of the VR version.
The controls also seem less intuitive.
the ￼ graphics are good and the performance is good but it is hard to change blocks and to fly but the game is pretty good ￼

cant figure out how to pull up menu. Some how keep triggering it but not sure how, even after pushing every button one by one over and over again...menu randomly appears after pushing random buttons but after pushing that same button again nothing happens. The devs apparently couldnt be bothered to walk you through their unconventional control layout

developer_response.body: Hey. Sorry to hear that you have problems with the controls. You just need to turn your hand/controller to the side to open menu. I think it is explained on the left board in the very first scene in the main menu. I'll see if I can improve it.

reviews.review_title: I got this on meta horizon+
reviews.review_description: This honestly is the one of the worst games  there was a video I couldn’t close i could see my room in rl and im glad it was free

developer_response.body:
Could you please get in contact with me?
support@noowanda.com

reviews.review_description: Has potential but kinda misleading and boring.

Everything in this game is fantastic. I bumped up all the graphics to Max and everything looks so cool. The game is about half of what the original Minecraft is, meaning needing more items. ￼please keep going with this. ￼

developer_response.body: Hey. Thanks a lot! I'm working on updates!

reviews.review_description: Can the texture flickering issue be fixed? This problem has persisted in both  discovery 1 and discovery 2.

reviews.review_title: This feels more like update than sequel
reviews.review_description: The previous game was abandoned in favor of a sequel that has similar features to the first game's beta branch. Odd

As the title says it legitimately doesnt work, all you can do is create a new world and move the camera however you cant bring it closer, cant move where the world is, cant break or place blocks, it legitimately doesnt work, I cannot give this higher then 1 star

developer_response.body: Hey. Sorry to hear that it doesn't work. Can we work this out via Discord? https://discord.com/invite/YhxG6dEHGR

reviews.review_description: Good and relaxing game you can just zone out for a couple hours and build your own little world.  I would like to see they ability to hold down your trigger/ grip to continuously place or remove blocks. Hitting the triggers 1000s of times repeatedly while building something big becomes alot after awhile. Also having the ability to travel faster when In fly mode would be nice. Maybe like a normal speed then hit a button to go twice as fast would be nice for traveling to different areas. Would like some more brick options and some characters / animals we can place so you dont feel like your a lone survivor in wasteland

reviews.review_title: Mixed Reality Mode is so cool
reviews.review_description: I've been a fan of Discovery since the WiiU. When I saw it was on Meta, I bought it again and spent quite a few hours on it, and then along came Discovery 2, so of course, I had to have it. The new draw distance adjustment and higher resolution adjustment options along with the new music and amazing sky....the clouds are so cool! I love that you can make what you're building fill the room by zooming in or shrinking it down and moving it around. It's really breathtaking! I'm looking forward to what's to come. It's worth every penny! I don't think there is anything else like this that offers such an amazing mixed reality experience. Newly updated with coop and the ability to upload your world to share with others.

developer_response.body: Wow. thx Mega! More is coming, but it'll take some time...

reviews.review_description: Will you please add survival mode
Please add the mobile version to the apple App Store and add a survival mode maybe also add some other features from Minecraft.

Been playing this for the last 3 weeks. Don't want to put it down, it's very addictive 👍👍

Please we need a way to share our creations with the world. What's the point of building if there's no way to show friends and family.

My favorite vr game hands down ❤️

developer_response.body: Thank you so much... Online world sharing is incomming!

reviews.review_description:
Amazing and visually stunning game. However the multiplayer update can't come soon enough!

Still no update :(

developer_response.body: Hey. Sorry for the late reply. The multiplayer update is live sind 6 monts or so. Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
I have logged in an insane amount of hours on the first Discovery game, my favorite way to chill in VR ...LOVE IT!! So when I stumbled upon the recent "Discovery 2" release I couldn't download it fast enough. I like the changes and new inventory layout and can't wait to play more!  I have only 1 complaint; (I know it is in early access) but PLEASE ADD SMOOTH TURNING ASAP!! I am a VR vet and I can't play a game with snap turning, so I will hold off delving deeper into the game until the patch is added. Keep up the awesome work Devs!!!!! P.S. I'm holding my breath, so please hurry!!

March 9, 2025--Dude...2 months ago, you PROMISED me you'd add Smooth Turning" in the next update, I got the update, but still NO Smooth Turning. Are your pants on fire??

At first this looked like a fun game. But I soon found out there’s limited content. You don’t have to mine for material or cut trees for wood, which would give you something to do. You just build whatever you can with the limited material you have. Just four doors to pick from, no blueprints for houses. Very disappointing. Hoping for an update to make it more like creativerse for us.

reviews.review_title: Amazing for building and modeling struct
reviews.review_description:
This is an amazing app for building architectural designs and for modeling, of course we need more assets and I'm sure the developer will add more as time goes on and I would be happy to pay for assets to keep the developer going, and I'm sure I'm not the only one.

I used to build on CyubeVR and I must say that I no longer visit CyubeVR as this developer has managed to create everything  I need in Discovery 2 which is even better for building ( in my opinion) and it runs unbelievably on the quest 3 stand alone! The 'God view' turns your landscape and buildings into a miniature desktop view in mixed reality and almost feels like building a Lego structure! 

This feature is amazing for model building and a real game changer! 
With one click you can jump back into the 'first person' view in the 3D world that you have created and your buildings and structures hit you with their real life scale and size... 

I hope the developer would consider the possibility of adding a moving train with tracks ( if at all possible on the quest 3). It would look amazing in the desktop view and a great way to explore in first person view toa show others your world that you have created while traveling on a train you built ( maybe on the Quest 4?)

* Just this Monday the 17th of February 2025 I suddenly noticed while using the app that there was an increase invisibility and all my buildings who normally turned into a basic blocky structures once you moved away a few blocks, can now be seen in all their detail from miles away making discovery 2 very appealing for any person who takes his building  seriously and wants to create large worlds.

This is an amazing accomplishment! there is however a very slight stuttering now but nothing major,  I will take that any day for having the visual increase that discovery 2 now offers! 


In short, Discovery 2 is amazing.. just buy it!

The fact that the developer has managed to do this on the quest 3 is simply astonishing! Well done developer I'm a fan! 🙂

developer_response.body: Wow! Thank you so much for this awesome review! Really keeps pushing me to work even harder on the game!

reviews.review_description:
So good. Endless fun.

 Can you make it so I can invite ppl from the meta dashboard. Thanks. Bit tough getting ppl into my game. Only complaint. 👍🏻

My brother and I just bought the game and we absolutely love it, but the problem we are having is we can't connect to lan multiplayer or online. I tried everything from port forwarding, resetting the router, update and more and we cannot connect. I'm not sure if the multiplayer is open yet since the game is new. I know for sure it's not our headsets because we can connect on every game that's multiplayer. I also have a suggestion on laying blocks. You should incorporate drop and drag for longer lines of block instead of one at a time.

This game is amazing with building in mixed reality table top view and in first person view, hands down feels like Minecraft but there needs to be more structures blocks and possibly add survival mode or even online multiplayer, but other then that best version of Minecraft. Great job devs keeps up the good work

Is it Minecraft? Not quite. Is it very much like it? Absolutely. Even if you aren't a fan of say Minecraft. I think this is something everyone can actually enjoy. Even for something so blocky it's beautiful. The graphics are just crazy. The ability to switch between first and table top view is awesome. I'd give this 10* if possible

developer_response.body: Wow! Thank you so much for the kind words and support! I'm so glad you're happy with the game. We're only at 10% of what this whole journey will ultimately be. Check out my Discord server to give direct feedback so I know what to do next!

reviews.review_description:
Even at early access this is a 5 star game for me. Essentially it's creative mode in Minecraft but with high graphic shaders, which look gorgeous btw. The mixed reality is so awesome! It makes me feel like I'm playing Legos in my house!

Dear developer, I've read that you plan to add much more to this game and I pray that you do! This is already one of my favorite games to play on the meta quest and I know it's only going to get better. So I look forward to what you're going to do with great anticipation! Can't wait to see more!

I’m enjoying it so far,it’s a good relaxing game to be creative and build. It’s not quite as in depth as Minecraft,there is no combat and no creatures. it’s definitely off to a great start. I definitely look forward to see where the devs take it. I highly recommend it

I first played discovery on mobile, i knew it was a minecraft knockoff from the beginning but I didnt know how much I'd love the game from the demo back then, im so glad it's come to vr in an official capacity, I really look forward to future updates to discovery 2, I also hope that there will be mod support for survival and creative alike, I cant wait to see this game become something beautiful, however I do hope to see more variants of wood type, as well as more doors and an actual mining mechanic much like the mobile version,I deeply enjoy this game as it has a close place in my heart from first playing the mobile version back in the early 2000s (roughly 2009/2010)

Please keep up the great work

The game itself for being Early Access is great I know it's not Minecraft but I'm hoping that the Creator adds survival mode and beds and the ability to sleep to make it like Minecraft buildings fun but it gets boring after a while.

reviews.review_title: I love this game pls take y'all's time:)
reviews.review_description: One of my favorite games from the phone as a kid before my parents would ever get me Minecraft which I ended up having to buy myself LOL but I can't wait to see how development goes and can't wait for survival but please take your time don't be rushed by pushy impatient fans

developer_response.body: Wow! Thanks for the continued support. It's crazy for me to hear that some ppl played the old Discovery on phone and are still with me! TY!! :D

reviews.review_title: Cool showcase at Best, Let me Explain
reviews.review_description:
Overall, the graphics and dynamic lighting are impressive, but there are several issues that detract from the experience. The building blocks are inadequate, and the interactions feel clunky, especially with hand tracking. This is particularly noticeable when trying to select or perform any action, as hand tracking lacks some of the controls that regular controllers offer. 

Additionally, there is a significant lack of settings available. I recommend turning off the ambient sound and expanding the passthrough tabletop circle, which should also be switchable to a square option.

Unfortunately, the settings don’t save after you turn off Vignette, which is frustrating. The game feels rather boring, as there isn’t much to do or explore—there are no entities besides the player. 

The game could benefit from a block picker control, allowing for click-and-drag functionality and a rotation option when placing blocks, as currently, you cannot rotate blocks at will. Additionally, I've encountered a frustrating bug that disrupts the tabletop experience: a block I placed in first person often appears far away or not aligned properly with the mini tabletop world in passthrough mode.

For more casual VR players, I highly recommend introducing a bare-bones mode. This mode would feature simple textures that are easy to see and comprehend both in the menu and while placing items—basically, a clean, minimalist aesthetic that is easy on the eyes. 

It would also be great if developers could add texture packs. This would help differentiate your game from other block games by allowing players to quickly switch and view their world in various styles. 

I believe it's essential for developers to address these issues and incorporate these features before the game's release. There may also be more improvements to consider beyond what I've mentioned here. Thank you for taking the time to read my suggestions, and I hope both the viewers and developers can take my feedback into account. Stay safe! 🙏💛

developer_response.body: Hey Telefant. Thanks for the detailed feedback and the vignette settings bug report. Sorry to hear that Discovery 2 didn't fulfill your expectations. Texture Packs are planned for one of the next updates and I may also refine controls. If you want to follow development more closely please consider joining my Discord: https://discord.gg/YhxG6dEHGR

reviews.review_description: I love this game already! Can’t wait to see what’s in store for this game. I’m. It into Minecraft but I am defiantly into this game.
Dont get me wrong its fun to play, but it definitly needs npc and crafting and more mechanics, fire on a tnt for example, does nothing

developer_response.body: Hi, thx for review! It's still early access and some things are missing or do not work completely. The idea was to give ppl the current game early instead of them having to wait another few months.

reviews.review_description: Graphically this game is absolutely stunning. The sky objects and shaders look phenomenal. Building is easy and even more fun in a LAN party with friends. Looking forward to the addition of online multiplayer! A must-own game on Quest for sure!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much!! <3 Online Multiplayer will arrive in February!!

reviews.review_description: Love the switching from tabletop to first person!  Impressive graphics too, with the moon, northern lights, sparking water, etc…. Can’t wait for multiplayer!

developer_response.body: Glad you like what's already there. Online-Multiplayer probably in February!

reviews.review_description:
Edit 2 and message for developer 2:  Nevermind I’m in 😂 

Still doesn’t work :( 

The link to your discord doesn’t work, and I tried At your website Noowanda, doesn’t work there either. 

So far this game is exactly what you want with MCraft in VR. Loving the game so far and have some suggestions if not brought up yet:

1. Please add a smooth turn mode, and maybe a speed slider for better comfort. Noticed I only can snap turn when in first person. 

2. Add a way to select multiple blocks at a time to destroy or build? Or possibly instead of clicking the build button every time to place a block, have an option to click and hold and slide to give the option of placing multiple blocks at once? Have this as a toggled option in case a player doesn’t want to use it also.

3. Hoping a campaign like mode comes in the future where we can have animals and people, as well as enemy characters to fight. Maybe a portal to another realm lol

4. Add a speed option to running so that you can fly to one area from another more quickly.

Other than those suggestions this game is awesome and I’m enjoying every bit of it.

developer_response.body:
EDIT: I fixed the link. Seems like Discord has invalidated invite links.

Ty! Gald you like the game. I'll add your suggestions to the "ToDo" list. If you can, follow my Discord here https://discord.gg/YhxG6dEHGR

reviews.review_title: Closest thing to a Minecraft VR
reviews.review_description:
I know the game is in early development, so me and my brother got this as a "Minecraft VR" type expierience to then realise Online Multi isnt availble right now! However, even though there are minimal blocks, and no survival with monsters etc i wanna say yet.. I am super happy with the beginning of this game, and can only imagine the plans to come.

I would like the Minecraft similarities such as sleeping through night, adding a survival mode, more blocks, portals, overworld, underworld etc you get the idea.

This game is worth every penny with the little we have now. Graphics are great, building is immaculate, tabletop is awesome especially when you can enlarge it to see better.

No faults. Gonna be the best VR creative expirience youll get

developer_response.body: Awww... TY! Online Multiplayer is planned for next month. Survival features will come over the year with (hopefully ;)) frequent updates! PLZZZ join our Discord https://discord.gg/YhxG6dEHGR where I post more about development and features!
